skill.name: brand-guidelines
skill.description: Applies Anthropic's official brand colors and typography to any sort of artifact that may benefit from having Anthropic's look-and-feel. Use it when brand colors or style guidelines, visual formatting, or company design standards apply.
skill.summary: Apply Anthropic brand colors, typography, and visual style to presentations, documents, and other designed artifacts.
skill.author: anthropics

security_audit.summary: Official Anthropic skill with documentation-only brand guidance and no executable files. Static risk markers were false positives from Apache license URLs and color value lines, with no prompt injection or dangerous behavior found.

content.value_statement: Teams need consistent Anthropic visual styling across generated materials. This skill provides official colors, typography rules, and practical styling guidance.
actual_capabilities: Lists Anthropic main colors and accent colors with exact hex values.
Defines Poppins for headings and Lora for body text with fallback fonts.
Guides smart text styling for headings, body copy, hierarchy, and readability.
Guides accent color use for non-text shapes and visual elements.
Explains how to preserve brand color fidelity in generated presentation styling.
limitations: It does not include image assets, logos, templates, or downloadable brand files.
It depends on system-installed fonts for exact Poppins and Lora rendering.
It provides styling guidance, not legal approval for brand usage.
It does not execute styling changes by itself without a compatible workflow.

use_cases.title: Style an Internal Presentation
use_cases.description: Apply Anthropic colors, heading fonts, body fonts, and accent shapes to a deck.

use_cases.title: Create Brand-Aligned Documentation
use_cases.description: Use official typography and color guidance when formatting explainers, reports, or handouts.

use_cases.title: Check Generated Visuals
use_cases.description: Review generated layouts for brand color accuracy, readable hierarchy, and appropriate accent use.

prompt_templates.title: Apply Basic Brand Styling
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner request for a simple visual refresh.
prompt_templates.prompt: Apply the Anthropic brand guidelines to this artifact. Use the official colors, heading typography, body typography, and readable contrast.

prompt_templates.title: Restyle a Presentation
prompt_templates.scenario: Intermediate request for a deck or slide set.
prompt_templates.prompt: Restyle this presentation using Anthropic brand colors and typography. Preserve the content structure and improve visual hierarchy where needed.

prompt_templates.title: Audit Brand Consistency
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced review of existing designed content.
prompt_templates.prompt: Audit this artifact against the Anthropic brand guidance. List mismatched colors, typography issues, hierarchy problems, and practical fixes.

prompt_templates.title: Design a Brand System Pass
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced request for a complete styling plan.
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a detailed styling plan for this artifact using Anthropic brand colors, typography, accent rules, and accessibility-minded contrast decisions.

output_examples.input: Restyle a three-slide strategy deck for Anthropic brand consistency.
output_examples.output: The deck uses dark text on light backgrounds, Poppins-style headings, Lora-style body copy, and orange, blue, and green accents.

output_examples.input: Review a report cover for brand alignment.
output_examples.output: The review flags a non-brand purple accent, recommends the official orange accent, and keeps body text in a serif fallback.

output_examples.input: Create guidance for a branded one-page handout.
output_examples.output: Use a light background, strong dark headings, restrained accent shapes, and clear body text with generous spacing.

best_practices: Use the exact listed hex values when matching Anthropic colors.
Install Poppins and Lora before generating final visual exports.
Keep accent colors secondary so the content remains readable.
anti_patterns: Do not replace the official palette with approximate brand-like colors.
Do not use decorative accents that reduce text contrast or readability.
Do not treat this styling guidance as logo licensing or legal approval.

faq.question: What does this skill help style?
faq.answer: It helps style artifacts that need Anthropic colors, typography, and visual formatting.

faq.question: Does it include official logos?
faq.answer: No. It provides color and typography guidance, not logo files or image assets.

faq.question: Which fonts does it recommend?
faq.answer: It recommends Poppins for headings and Lora for body text, with Arial and Georgia fallbacks.

faq.question: Can it work without custom fonts installed?
faq.answer: Yes. It describes fallback fonts, but final results are closer when Poppins and Lora are installed.

faq.question: Is this skill safe to publish?
faq.answer: Yes. It is an official documentation-only skill with no executable files or dangerous instructions.

faq.question: Does it approve brand usage?
faq.answer: No. It helps with visual styling, but users must follow any applicable brand and legal requirements.
